title: Hello World — AI Has Changed Everything, and We're Here For It
description: The web industry has been upended by AI. Here's why that's the best thing that could have happened for small businesses — and why Jefferis Software Solutions is uniquely positioned to deliver incredible digital experiences to more clients than ever before.
content:
The industry just got flipped on its head

Let's not sugar-coat it — AI has completely upended the web industry. The tools, the workflows, the expectations, the speed at which things move — none of it looks the way it did even a year ago. Entire agencies are scrambling to figure out what their role is now that a solo developer with the right tools can outpace a team of ten.

And honestly? That's exactly the kind of shake-up this industry needed.

For years, small businesses have been stuck in a frustrating middle ground. You could pay an agency thousands of pounds for a website that took months to deliver — or you could drag and drop something together on a page builder that looked like everyone else's. Neither option was great. The quality gap between what big companies got and what small businesses could afford was enormous.

That gap just closed

AI hasn't replaced good design or smart development — but it has supercharged both. The things that used to take days now take hours. The research, the iteration, the fine-tuning — all of it happens faster, which means the end product is better and more affordable.

This is where Jefferis Software Solutions comes in.

We've always operated as a lean, one-person studio — no account managers, no layers of bureaucracy, no bloated teams passing your project from desk to desk. You talk directly to the person building your site. That model was already efficient. With AI in the mix, it's become something else entirely.

What this means for you

It means we can now deliver incredibly high-quality digital experiences to a much wider variety of clients than was ever before possible. The kind of performance, design, and SEO work that used to be reserved for businesses with five-figure budgets is now within reach for local trades, small studios, independent consultants — anyone who takes their work seriously and wants a website that reflects that.

We're talking 98+ PageSpeed scores. Sub-second load times. Sites that actually convert visitors into enquiries. Proper SEO from day one. Not because we've cut corners — because the entire process of building something excellent has become dramatically more efficient.

Why we started this blog

This is our first post, so — hello world.

We're starting this blog because we think there's a lot of noise out there and not enough straight talk. We'll be sharing what we've learned about building websites that actually work, honest takes on the tools and trends shaping the industry, and the occasional behind-the-scenes look at how we build things.

No fluff. No filler content written to game an algorithm. Just useful stuff from someone who builds websites every day.

If you're reading this and thinking about your own site

Whether you're starting from scratch or you've got a website that isn't pulling its weight — now is genuinely the best time to do something about it. The barrier to getting something exceptional built has never been lower.

Have a look at our packages, or just get in touch. No pressure, no hard sell — just a conversation about what would actually help your business.

We're glad you're here. Let's build something good.
